construction_fork.baseline: program-native indefinite/Krein carrier on the compact/complexified (4,0)+(5,5) split
construction_fork.physical_complex_half: one complex Hodge-star eigenspace for the Lorentzian (3,1)+(6,4) split
construction_fork.physical_real_closure: the complex half plus its physical-conjugate anti-self-dual half

claim_dispositions.192: survives as the complex dimension of one Lorentzian self-dual half; a real-form-stable closure has complex dimension 384
claim_dispositions.(3,2,16)+(3,2,16bar): survives only as complexified branching notation for one selected half; physical conjugation exchanges it with the anti-self-dual conjugate half
claim_dispositions.(96,96): does not transfer as a nondegenerate Krein signature on one physical complex half; that half is K-null, while the real-form-stable closure has signature (192,192)
claim_dispositions.(2,2,2,2,0): compact/complexified only; the physical complex half gives (2,2,0,0,0) and the real-form closure gives (4,4,4,4,0)
claim_dispositions.antilinear chirality: physical conjugation preserves total 14d chirality but swaps base and internal chirality separately and exchanges the selected Lorentzian half

central_verdict.reason: No equivariant total-chirality-swapping linear or antilinear map appears on the real-form-stable closure, so the tested C1-C5 no-swap/2-primary conclusion is not reversed. The compact numerical packet and the meaning of chirality do not transfer unchanged.
central_verdict.open_scope: C6 characteristic classes on the true physical bundle were not reconstructed, so full physical class-C transfer remains open.
